entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary:
The email from Billy Tetrud emphasizes the importance of elevating the discourse surrounding Bitcoin Improvement Proposals (BIPs). He supports Jorge's call for a more detailed analysis of each BIP, suggesting that discussions should focus on the technical merits of the claims. It is advised that any comment or critique of previous statements should not only identify possible misinformation or fallacies but also provide a citation of the original source. This approach helps in presenting a balanced view of the contested claim and clarifies why it may fail to contribute effectively to the understanding of technical consensus.
Furthermore, Billy notes the presence of many negative comments within the community discussions, hinting at the need for a "Truth and Reconciliation" process to address these issues comprehensively. This initiative would likely involve significant effort, akin to authoring another historical account, suggesting the scale and intensity of the work required to mend the divisions and enhance the collective understanding of the technical aspects under debate.
